text:
こちら補給隊のトラスポ！
近くにいるアークス！　聞こえるか？

トラックの駆動系が故障！
緊急事態だ！　至急救援を頼む！

コイツ、直したばっかりなのに。
なんでまた……。
修理が終わるまで、援護してくれ！
This is Traspo, with the Supply Unit! All nearby ARKS defenders, can you hear me?
The truck's engine is disabled! This is bad! Emergency support requested!

Aw, I just fixed this stupid thing!
I can't believe it...
Defend the truck until repairs are complete!
